description: Curated presentation/demo cases covering negation, calm text, clear stress language, and borderline situations.

cases.text: I am not stressed at all today.
This feels like a stress free evening and I am relaxed.
Everything is fine and I feel calm.
I am okay and just resting after a normal day.
I am overwhelmed with deadlines and cannot sleep.
The workload is crushing me and I feel constant pressure.
I feel exhausted, burned out, and mentally drained.
I am anxious all day and panic before every meeting.
Family problems have left me hopeless and stuck.
My heart races every night and I cannot relax anymore.
I am tired, but I am not stressed right now.
There is a lot going on and I do not know how I feel.
